title: The Sea Hound
director: W.B. Eason, Mack V. Wright, Sam Newfield
writer: Lewis Clay, Arthur Hoerl, George H. Plympton
actors: Buster Crabbe, Jimmy Lloyd, Pamela Blake
plot: Captain Silver and his crew receive a distress call in the South Pacific. They rescue the crew of a yacht from modern pirates and get caught up in a search for lost treasure.
